name: Ice slip outside work building in Murray UT—whose fault?
description: Comp primary; sue mgr if negligent.[1]

mainEntity.name: Ice slip outside work building in Murray UT—whose fault?

acceptedAnswer.text: Comp primary; sue mgr if negligent.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Workers' comp if during shift; third-party if property mgr negligent.** Course-of-employment key.[1][4] Photos of uncleared ice vital. Dual claims possible.
